confidence.label: moderate
confidence.rationale: Maximum sacred-political-order-strength score is supported by both the German and French mobilization declarations dissolving internal distinctions and invoking sacred national unity. Confidence capped at moderate given the multi-nation unit-of-analysis and variable national trajectories after mobilization.

reviewNote: Score value 5/5 defensible: collective-immortality-to-sacrifice mechanism (nationalist sacrifice discourse across all major belligerents) supports maximum sacred-political-order-strength. Confidence 0.60 reflects chain-requires-expansion and the multi-nation unit-of-analysis problem (the case aggregates several national orders). Hold at score-review; specify the unit of analysis before human-reviewed.
